context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. Vault-seed-ready publication prep remains dry-run validated; reference-driver supply now includes plan-only worker profiles.
current_tasks: Commit 6d4fde8b exposes bounded worker profiles in the reference-driver capability supply map while keeping runtime dispatch blocked behind readiness proofs.
@refarm.dev/cli/worker-profile is the product-neutral SDK surface for agents-as-tools descriptors and assessWorkerToolReadiness().
pnpm -C packages/cli run test, pnpm run reference-driver:smoke:plan, git diff --check, and refarm agent finish after-edit/after-commit passed for the worker-profile supply slice.

Validated pnpm run release:vault-seed:check on 2026-06-28: publish dry-run passed for all 10 vault-seed-ready packages; do not repeat unless package metadata, files, exports, or release policy changes.
next_actions: Continue publication readiness with the cheap path first: generate/update vault-seed-ready handoff artifacts or final release readiness docs/checklist, without repeating the dry-run unless inputs changed.
For agents-as-tools, consume assessWorkerToolReadiness() as the promotion gate; implement runtime-dispatch only after policy, cancellation, observability, and cost-control proofs are local and cheap.
Keep reusable SDK naming product-neutral where possible; package/CLI identity may remain Refarm, but generic descriptors should not require downstream labels.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
